subcategory: WebGL shader canvas background with fluid ink effect
use_cases: Full-screen hero background for landing pages with organic flowing visuals
Interactive ambient background that responds to mouse movement
Visual centerpiece for creative portfolios and digital experiences
Atmospheric canvas for SaaS product pages and marketing sites
Decorative background for media and entertainment web applications
ai_summary: An interactive WebGL shader canvas component that renders ethereal, flowing ink-like visuals. Uses custom hooks for mouse tracking and performance optimization, creating organic gradients that respond to cursor position. Designed as a full-screen background effect for hero sections and landing pages, with smooth 60fps animation and throttled input handling for optimal performance.
